diagrams.title: Gradient Vector Field Visualization
diagrams.description: 2D contour plot with gradient vectors arrows showing steepest ascent direction at each point
elements: Arrows point perpendicular to contours toward higher values
diagrams.purpose: Understand that gradient is perpendicular to level curves and points uphill

diagrams.title: Jacobian Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: m×n matrix layout showing rows for output functions and columns for input variables
elements: Highlight: scalar function gives 1×n (row), vector gives m×n
diagrams.purpose: Visualize Jacobian as extended derivative table for vector functions

diagrams.title: Critical Point Classification
diagrams.description: 3D surface plots showing (a) local minimum (bowl), (b) local maximum (cup inverted), (c) saddle point (saddle shape)
elements: Level curves showing contours around each type
diagrams.purpose: Connect Hessian eigenvalues to surface curvature and point classification

diagrams.title: Directional Derivative Geometry
diagrams.description: Tangent plane approximation showing directional derivative as slope in specific direction
elements: Tangent line showing rate of change in that direction
Gradient vector in xy-plane showing max ascent direction
diagrams.purpose: Visualize Dᵤf as the slope you would feel walking in direction u
